title: DIY Electronic Load (Constant Current)
description: Bench-top programmable electronic load using an IRFP250N MOSFET in linear mode, controlled by an LM358 op-amp feedback loop. An MCP4725 I²C 12-bit DAC sets the target current; an INA219 measures actual current and voltage; an OLED displays set/actual current, voltage, and power. Rotary encoder adjusts current setpoint.
objective: Constant-current load 0–5 A, 0–30 V; current accuracy ±50 mA; dissipate up to 50 W (with heatsink + fan); display I, V, P in real time; setpoint adjustable in 50 mA steps via rotary encoder.
constraints: 12 V fan power from same supply; MOSFET on aluminium heatsink; protection: reverse polarity diode, 6 A fuse; ≤ £30 BOM.
supporting_fact_titles: N-Channel MOSFET as a Low-Side Power Switch
OLED SSD1306 Monochrome Display I²C Interface
Rotary Encoder — Incremental A/B Quadrature Pulse Counting
design_element_titles: INA219 I²C Current and Power Monitor

element_usage_notes.MOSFET Constant-Current Load Stage: IRFP250N on 200 mm × 150 mm heatsink; 0.1 Ω / 5 W sense resistor; LM358 op-amp; MCP4725 12-bit DAC (I²C 0x60) sets gate voltage target; fan on D7 above 40 °C.
element_usage_notes.INA219 I²C Current and Power Monitor: I²C address 0x40; 0.1 Ω shunt on DUT negative rail; polled at 20 Hz; provides current_mA and bus_v for display and coulomb-counting energy measurement.
element_usage_notes.SSD1306 OLED Display UI Module: 128×64; 4-line layout: Set I / Actual I / Voltage / Power (W). Flashes 'OTP!' if NTC thermistor on heatsink > 80 °C.
element_usage_notes.Rotary Encoder User-Interface Navigation: KY-040; CLK D2, DT D4, SW D3; 50 mA per detent; hold push = coarse 500 mA steps; full push = toggle load ON/OFF.
element_usage_notes.Arduino Uno/Nano MCU Platform: Nano 3.0; I²C A4/A5 (INA219 + OLED + MCP4725); ENC CLK D2 INT0; fan D7; NTC A0.

element_interactions.data: direction delta (±1 per detent, ±10 held) + toggle press via GPIO INT
element_interactions.description: Short rotation: ±50 mA per detent. Hold-press toggles load active (DAC output vs 0). Setpoint clamped 0–5000 mA.

element_interactions.data: 12-bit DAC value (0–4095) via I²C to MCP4725 (0x60)
element_interactions.description: Setpoint_mA × 0.1 Ω / 3300 mV × 4095 = DAC code. DAC output drives op-amp non-inverting input; op-amp output controls MOSFET gate.

element_interactions.from: INA219 I²C Current and Power Monitor
element_interactions.data: current_mA (float), bus_v (float), power_mW (float) via I²C at 20 Hz
element_interactions.description: Actual current and voltage read at 20 Hz. Power = V × I computed; cumulative energy (Wh) accumulated for run duration display.

element_interactions.data: I²C framebuffer (set_ma, actual_ma, voltage_v, power_w, energy_wh, otp_flag)
element_interactions.description: OLED updated at 4 Hz. Flashes OTP warning if heatsink NTC > 80 °C and reduces load to 50 % automatically.
